title: Revert "write_xaiger: only instantiate each whitebox cell type once"
body:
Reverts YosysHQ/yosys#1588

This is a priority as it causes abc9 flows for ecp5 and ice40 to totally break.

Even the following small example:

```verilog
module led_blink (
        input clk,
        output ledc
    );
 
    reg [6:0] led_counter = 0;
    always @( posedge clk ) begin
            led_counter <= led_counter + 1;
    end
    assign ledc = !led_counter[ 6:3 ];
 
endmodule
```

fails `prep; equiv_opt -map +/ecp5/cells_sim.v synth_ecp5 -abc9` with:

```
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:251:find_same_wires$3852: \ledc_gold \ledc_gate
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3851: \led_counter_gold [6] \led_counter_gate [6]
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3849: \led_counter_gold [4] \led_counter_gate [4]
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3847: \led_counter_gold [2] \led_counter_gate [2]
Found a total of 4 unproven $equiv cells.
```
and indeed something very strange is going on with these bits:
![Screenshot from 2019-12-27 23-30-03](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5521177/71535813-e364e300-2900-11ea-808c-1ba6d62160d4.png)
code_blocks:
Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:251:find_same_wires$3852: \ledc_gold \ledc_gate
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3851: \led_counter_gold [6] \led_counter_gate [6]
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3849: \led_counter_gold [4] \led_counter_gate [4]
  Unproven $equiv $auto$equiv_make.cc:280:find_same_wires$3847: \led_counter_gold [2] \led_counter_gate [2]
Found a total of 4 unproven $equiv cells.
